name: Cajun-Style Pork Chops
recipeIngredient: 4 pork rib or loin chops, cut 1 1/4 inches thick
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the onion powder, white pepper, red pepper, black pepper, and 1/4 teaspoon of salt.
2. Trim any excess fat from the pork chops.
3. Rub both sides of each chop with the seasoning mixture.
4. Grill the chops on the rack of an uncovered grill directly over medium coals for 25-35 minutes, or until no pink remains and juices run clear. Turn the chops once during grilling.
5. Makes 4 servings.
